description: Port src/app/api/billing/subscription/cancel/route.ts into a deployed Lambda route. Scope: enforce browser mutation protection using same-origin and preferably a CSRF header/token compatible with the Vite patient app; verify Cognito patient session; resolve Stripe secret; call cancelPatientSubscriptionAtPeriodEnd through the billing activation repository; return subscription_not_active for inactive accounts and billing_unavailable for retryable provider/storage failures; set no-store headers. The initial MDI cancellation action may remain the current unsupported/deferred action unless a separate clinical cancellation integration is introduced. Wire POST /api/billing/subscription/cancel in CDK with least-privilege DynamoDB and Secrets Manager access. Acceptance criteria: live route no longer returns 404; dashboard cancellation flow works against API Gateway; tests cover invalid origin/CSRF, unauthenticated, inactive subscription, provider/storage failure, and successful cancel-at-period-end.
title: Add Lambda/API Gateway route for POST /api/billing/subscription/cancel
